fallback.hi-IN: Maaf kijiye, thodi dikkat aa rahi hai. Kya aap phir se bata sakte hain?
fallback.ta-IN: Mannikkavum, sila thozhilnutpa prachanai. Thayavu seythu meendum sollunga?
fallback.bn-IN: Dukkhito, ektu somossa hocche. Abar bolben please?
fallback.gu-IN: Maaf karo, thodi taklif chhe. Fari kahesho?
fallback.kn-IN: Kshamisi, swalpa samasye ide. Matte heli?
fallback.ml-IN: Kshamikku, oru prayaasam undu. ViiNdum parayoo?
fallback.mr-IN: Maaf karaa, thodi adchan aahe. Punha saangaal kaa?
fallback.pa-IN: Maafi, thodi dikkat hai. Fir dassoge?
fallback.od-IN: Kshama karantu, gotie samasya achhi. Punithare kahantu?
fallback.en-IN: Sorry, there's a small issue. Could you say that again?
